title: Day 33 Lesson 1 - Practice 2
html:
How to use this lesson - Listen and respond to the teacher. You'll hear the correct answers after each pause. Keep practising until you get the answer perfect every time!

Though we demonstrate 「なければなりません」 in answer sentences for your practice, answer sentences without 「なければなりません」 is rather common such as 「なんじまでに　くうこうに　つかなければなりませんか」「7じです」.
